value:
I understand how stressful that is. However, I'm not able to manage credit card security from here—you'll need to contact your credit card issuer directly right away to report the theft and have them freeze or cancel the card. They're the only ones who can take immediate action on your account.

If you have any charges from us that you believe are fraudulent, please let me know your booking details and I'm happy to look into those for you.
